requestId.description: The id that was requested. This can be a ticker, cusip or factset entity id.

companyName.description: Name of the company reported in signal. Omitted if null.

signalId.description: Signal Id for this event. e.g. dilutionTrigger

signalName.description: Signal Name for this event. e.g. dilutionTrigger

theme.description: Theme name of the signal for this event. e.g. Debt Capital Structure

source.description: Primary data provider for the signal this event belongs to. e.g. FactSet, Bitvore

eventId.description: A unique id for this event.

eventDate.description: The UTC date/time of the event in ISO 8601 format.

summary.description: One sentence summary of the event.

userRelevanceScore.description: Relevancy score of this event for the requesting user on a scale of 0 to 1. Higher value indicates more relevancy.

created.description: Date/Time in UTC the event was first recorded in our data store.
